description_long: This kiosk consists of two large, flat rectangular panels joined at an angle, forming a V-shaped structure. Each panel features a prominent, recessed rectangular display area, likely intended for posters, advertisements, or informational signage. The panels are supported by four sturdy, triangular feet that provide stability and elevate the structure slightly above the ground. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a smooth, matte surface finish, suggesting a modern aesthetic. The kiosk appears to be constructed primarily from lightweight metal or rigid plastic, with the display areas possibly made of acrylic or glass. There are no visible doors, windows, or interactive components beyond the display surfaces.
description: A modern, V-shaped kiosk with two large display panels and four triangular support feet, featuring recessed poster areas and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing both display panels and all four support feet, with the recessed display areas clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the panels and the depth of the support feet.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the back of both panels and the full arrangement of the support feet.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the slimness of the structure and the alignment of the support feet.
attribute_signage_type: printed sign; two large rectangular poster areas integrated into each panel; no visible text or symbols
attribute_roof_design: flat, continuous with the panels, no overhangs or decorative elements
